chosen_action.title: Repair empty-board fallback that drifted into owned_content during the active short review window

why_this_action.summary: Apollo auth truthfulness was already repaired, but the execution board still had no truthful do-now packet and the selector drifted into owned_content anyway. The highest-leverage action was a concrete distribution-architecture repair so the loop escalates this state instead of masking it behind another fake fallback lane.
shared_findings_used: drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: board still says there is no truthful do-now packet in the current review window
agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json: selector was still falling back to owned_content after the board stayed empty
agents/marketing/logs/apollo_status.json: Apollo is authenticated, so the old blocker already changed and the empty board must be handled truthfully
agents/marketing/logs/adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat, so fake owned-content fallback would waste the slot

result.summary: Patched lane selection so an empty execution board inside the active short review window escalates to distribution_architecture_repair when the selector would otherwise drift into owned_content, added a regression test, and re-ran the selector to verify the repaired lane.

verification.post_repair_reason: The execution board is still empty inside the active short review window, but the selector drifted into owned_content anyway; perform a concrete distribution-architecture repair now instead of masking the empty-board failure behind a fake fallback lane.
